existing.description:
existing secret, you can specify multiple existing secrets, for each
specify the env var name followed by the key in existing secret that
will be used to populate the env var
existing_secret_name:
ALERT_ON_RELOAD: alert_on_reload_key
ALERT_SINK: alert_sink_key
ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL: alert_webhook_key
ALERT_ADDITIONAL_INFO: alert_additional_info_key

secret.description: secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.

readOnlyRootFileSystem.description: Set to true if you have a pod security policy that enforces readOnlyRootFilesystem

reloadStrategy.description: Set to default, env-vars or annotations

serviceAccount.description: Service account config for the agent pods

imageRegistry.description:
Reference to one or more secrets to be used when pulling images
ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/pull-image-private-registry/

serviceAccount.description: Service account config for the agent pods

name.description:
The name of the ServiceAccount to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

secret.description: secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.
secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.

honorLabels.description:
Retain the job and instance labels of the metrics pushed to the Pushgateway
[Scraping Pushgateway](https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway#configure-the-pushgateway-as-a-target-to-scrape)

name.description:
The name of the ServiceAccount to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

serviceAccount.description: Service account config for the agent pods

custom_annotations.description:
Optional flags to pass to the Reloader entrypoint
Example:
custom_annotations:
configmap: "my.company.com/configmap"
secret: "my.company.com/secret"
ignore: "my.company.com/reloader-ignore"

affinity.description:
An affinity stanza to be applied to the Deployment.
Example:
affinity:
nodeAffinity:
requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
nodeSelectorTerms:
- matchExpressions:
- key: "node-role.kubernetes.io/infra-worker"
operator: "Exists"

dnsConfig.description:
Specifies the deployment DNS configuration.
nameservers:
- 1.2.3.4
searches:
- ns1.svc.cluster-domain.example
- my.dns.search.suffix
options:
- name: ndots
value: "1"
- name: attempts
value: "3"

existing.description:
existing secret, you can specify multiple existing secrets, for each
specify the env var name followed by the key in existing secret that
will be used to populate the env var
existing_secret_name:
ALERT_ON_RELOAD: alert_on_reload_key
ALERT_SINK: alert_sink_key
ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL: alert_webhook_key
ALERT_ADDITIONAL_INFO: alert_additional_info_key

field.description:
ALERT_ON_RELOAD: <"true"|"false">
ALERT_SINK: <"slack"> # By default it will be a raw text based webhook
ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL: <"webhook_url">
ALERT_ADDITIONAL_INFO: <"Additional Info like Cluster Name if needed">
field supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values from other fields of pod.

open.description: Open supports Key value pair as environment variables.

secret.description: secret supports Key value pair as environment variables. It gets the values based on keys from default reloader secret if any.

gomaxprocsOverride.description:
Put "0" in either to have go runtime ignore the set value.
Otherwise, see https://pkg.go.dev/runtime#hdr-Environment_Variables for GOMAXPROCS and GOMEMLIMIT

livenessProbe.description: Liveness and readiness probe timeout values.

readinessProbe.description:
timeoutSeconds: 5
failureThreshold: 5
periodSeconds: 10
successThreshold: 1
timeoutSeconds: 15
failureThreshold: 5
periodSeconds: 10
successThreshold: 1

replicas.description: If you wish to run multiple replicas set reloader.enableHA = true

resources.description:
Specify resource requests/limits for the deployment.
Example:
resources:
limits:
cpu: "100m"
memory: "512Mi"
requests:
cpu: "10m"
memory: "128Mi"

tolerations.description:
A list of tolerations to be applied to the Deployment.
Example:
tolerations:
- key: "node-role.kubernetes.io/infra-worker"
operator: "Exists"
effect: "NoSchedule"

topologySpreadConstraints.description:
Topology spread constraints for pod assignment
Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/pod-topology-spread-constraints/
Example:
topologySpreadConstraints:
- maxSkew: 1
topologyKey: zone
whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
labelSelector:
matchLabels:
app.kubernetes.io/instance: my-app

enableHA.description: Set to true to enable leadership election allowing you to run multiple replicas

enableMetricsByNamespace.description: Set to true to expose a prometheus counter of reloads by namespace (this metric may have high cardinality in clusters with many namespaces)

enablePProf.description: Set to true to enable pprof for profiling

ignoreCronJobs.description:
Set to true to exclude CronJob workloads from automatic reload monitoring
Useful when you don't want CronJobs to be restarted when their referenced ConfigMaps/Secrets change

ignoreJobs.description:
Set to true to exclude Job workloads from automatic reload monitoring
Useful when you don't want Jobs to be restarted when their referenced ConfigMaps/Secrets change

ignoreNamespaces.description: Comma separated list of namespaces to ignore

logLevel.description: Log level to use (trace, debug, info, warning, error, fatal and panic)

namespaceSelector.description: Comma separated list of k8s label selectors for namespaces selection

enabled.description:
Set the minimum available replicas
minAvailable: 1
OR Set the maximum unavailable replicas
maxUnavailable: 1
If both defined only maxUnavailable will be used

annotations.description:
Used to pass annotations that are used by the Prometheus installed in your cluster to select Service Monitors to work with
ref: https://github.com/coreos/prometheus-operator/blob/master/Documentation/api.md#prometheusspec

enabled.description:
Set the namespace the podMonitor should be deployed
namespace: monitoring

honorLabels.description:
Retain the job and instance labels of the metrics pushed to the Pushgateway
[Scraping Pushgateway](https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway#configure-the-pushgateway-as-a-target-to-scrape)

labels.description:
Used to pass Labels that are used by the Prometheus installed in your cluster to select Service Monitors to work with
ref: https://github.com/coreos/prometheus-operator/blob/master/Documentation/api.md#prometheusspec

metricRelabelings.description:
Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion.
[Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)
- action: keep
regex: 'kube_(daemonset|deployment|pod|namespace|node|statefulset).+'
sourceLabels: [__name__]

relabelings.description:
Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion.
[Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)
- sourceLabels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name]
separator: ;
regex: ^(.*)$
targetLabel: nodename
replacement: $1
action: replace

pprofAddr.description: Address to start pprof server on. Default is ":6060"

readOnlyRootFileSystem.description: Set to true if you have a pod security policy that enforces readOnlyRootFilesystem

reloadStrategy.description: Set to default, env-vars or annotations

resourceLabelSelector.description: Comma separated list of k8s label selectors for configmap/secret selection

create.description: Specifies whether a ServiceAccount should be created

name.description:
The name of the ServiceAccount to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

serviceAccount.description: Service account config for the agent pods

annotations.description:
Used to pass annotations that are used by the Prometheus installed in your cluster to select Service Monitors to work with
ref: https://github.com/coreos/prometheus-operator/blob/master/Documentation/api.md#prometheusspec

enabled.description:
Deprecated: Service monitor will be removed in future releases of reloader in favour of Pod monitor
Enabling this requires service to be enabled as well, or no endpoints will be found
Set the namespace the ServiceMonitor should be deployed
namespace: monitoring

honorLabels.description:
Retain the job and instance labels of the metrics pushed to the Pushgateway
[Scraping Pushgateway](https://github.com/prometheus/pushgateway#configure-the-pushgateway-as-a-target-to-scrape)

labels.description:
Used to pass Labels that are used by the Prometheus installed in your cluster to select Service Monitors to work with
ref: https://github.com/coreos/prometheus-operator/blob/master/Documentation/api.md#prometheusspec

metricRelabelings.description:
Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion.
[Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)
- action: keep
regex: 'kube_(daemonset|deployment|pod|namespace|node|statefulset).+'
sourceLabels: [__name__]

relabelings.description:
Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion.
[Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)
- sourceLabels: [__meta_kubernetes_pod_node_name]
separator: ;
regex: ^(.*)$
targetLabel: nodename
replacement: $1
action: replace

controlledResources.description:
List of resources that the vertical pod autoscaler can control. Defaults to cpu and memory
Specifies which resource values should be controlled: RequestsOnly or RequestsAndLimits.
controlledValues: RequestsAndLimits

maxAllowed.description: Define the max allowed resources for the pod

minAllowed.description:
cpu: 200m
memory: 100Mi
Define the min allowed resources for the pod
cpu: 200m
memory: 100Mi

updateMode.description:
Specifies minimal number of replicas which need to be alive for VPA Updater to attempt pod eviction
minReplicas: 1
Specifies whether recommended updates are applied when a Pod is started and whether recommended updates
are applied during the life of a Pod. Possible values are "Off", "Initial", "Recreate", and "Auto".
